summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was invented, no security-sensitive refs were present, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed for this shard. Each listed PR contains potentially useful contributor work and should remain open for its own maintainer/review path.

actions.reason: Useful draft contributor PR with review changes pending; keep open as a related Matrix fix candidate rather than closing or inventing a canonical.
Focused useful Teams bug-fix PR that should stay open for maintainer review; close/merge/fix actions are unavailable in this inventory job.
Useful open contributor feature PR with stale/review gates; keep open as its own review item because this shard cannot repair, merge, or close it.
Focused contributor bug-fix PR tied to an open issue, with proof/review state still requiring normal maintainer handling; keep open.
Useful focused cron/session-state PR with unresolved review/author follow-up; keep open rather than closing or merging from inventory.
